ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "author_year" TEXT /* Combined field representing the author and year of publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal or conference where the publication was published */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., article, conference paper, book chapter) */,
  "publication_status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., published, in-press, submitted) */,
  "doi_prefix" TEXT /* DOI prefix of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "research_field" TEXT /* Research field of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID of the author */,
  "scopus_id" TEXT /* Scopus ID of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "pub_author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication-author relationship */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order_of_authorship" INTEGER /* Order of authorship in the publication */,
  "author_role" TEXT /* Role of the author in the publication (e.g., corresponding author, co-author) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publication_authors_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "S" INTEGER /* Metric S: Significance of the research */,
  "B" INTEGER /* Metric B: Breadth of the research */,
  "E" INTEGER /* Metric E: Empirical evidence */,
  "I" INTEGER /* Metric I: Innovation */,
  "SR" INTEGER /* Metric SR: Scholarly rigor */,
  "C" INTEGER /* Metric C: Clarity of presentation */,
  "D" INTEGER /* Metric D: Depth of analysis */,
  "O" INTEGER /* Metric O: Originality */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* h-index of the publication */,
  "g_index" INTEGER /* g-index of the publication */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Citation count of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "citing_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication that cites another publication */,
  "cited_pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation was made */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., self-citation, co-author citation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication the comment is made on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, answer, feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, reviewer) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the publication */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the publication was shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was shared */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., public, private) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_shares_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency of the project */,
  "total_funding_amount" TEXT /* Total funding amount of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
